prestazioni: VR30DDTT (3.0L twin-turbo V6) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes (Catted, 200-cell) from FTP Motorsports, supporting 550whp on E85 with a Cobb Accessport Pro-Tune (Stage 2+ calibration).

VR30DDTT fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines, and a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump with a Fore Innovations F2i fuel pressure regulator for consistent 60psi base pressure under boost.

VR30DDTT cooling: CSF Racing aluminum radiator (direct-fit, 42mm core) with dual 12" SPAL fans (1,250 CFM each), Mishimoto silicone hoses (black, 4-ply), and a Setrab 50-row oil cooler (front-mount, 19-row core) with -10AN lines and a Derale remote thermostat for oil temps under 220°F at track use.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (QX50-specific, 3-piece front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a 3M Satin Matte Pearl White wrap (OEM+ finish).

Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (QX50-specific) featuring a 3D-printed ABS front splitter (50mm overhang), carbon fiber rear diffuser (with integrated LED reverse lights), and a custom 1.5m rear wing (dual-element, 3° adjustable angle) from Seibon Carbon.

OEM+ wheel setup: WORK Emotion CR Kiwami (20x10.5 +25 front, 20x11 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (355mm rotors) big brake kit (QX50-specific, no spacers required).
